## 🚀 Feature Overview / 功能概述
Is your feature request related to a problem or new concurrency primitive? Please describe.
请描述您希望新增的功能、新并发原语（例如 Semaphore / Barrier / Broadcast Channel）或性能优化。

## 💡 Proposed API Design / 建议的 API 设计
```python
# How would users use this feature? / 用户将如何使用此功能？
from pysync import NewPrimitive

# Code snippet / 代码示例
```

## 🎯 Value & Benchmark Expectation / 价值与期望
Why would this feature be useful for Python 3.14t Free-Threaded (No-GIL) applications?
描述此功能对于 Python 3.14t 自由线程应用的价值与意义。
